<?php namespace Aws\EndpointV2\Rule; use Aws\EndpointV2\Ruleset\RulesetStandardLibrary; use Aws\Exception\UnresolvedEndpointException; class ErrorRule extends AbstractRule { /** @var array */ private $error; public function __construct($definition) { parent::__construct($definition); $this->error = $definition['error']; } /** * @return array */ public function getError() { return $this->error; } /** * If an error rule's conditions are met, raise an * UnresolvedEndpointError containing the fully resolved error string. * * @return null * @throws UnresolvedEndpointException */ public function evaluate( array $inputParameters, RulesetStandardLibrary $standardLibrary ) { if ($this->evaluateConditions($inputParameters, $standardLibrary)) { $message = $standardLibrary->resolveValue($this->error, $inputParameters); throw new UnresolvedEndpointException($message); } return false; } }
